definition: The current condition of a program object process or system.
Association between a name and value or location.
A way to access a stored value or object indirectly.
Multiple references to the same mutable value.
A change outside a local expression result.
A value cannot be changed after creation.
A set of states and allowed transitions.
A grouped state change that succeeds or fails as a unit.
A stored value used to avoid repeated computation.
Behavior that depends on timing or interleaving.
Returning state to an earlier valid condition.
Record of state changes over time.
